content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 12, 2002

Bill Young, Deputy Chief
Bureau of Private Postsecondary & Vocational Education
Post Office Box 980818
West Sacramento, CA 95798-0818

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-160

Dear Mr. Young:

Pursuant to our recent conversations, this office is treating as withdrawn your agency's request for advice dated June 28, 2001. We look forward to meeting with you and your staff at your offices on March 19, 2002, at 2:00 p.m.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Counsel, Legal Division
